verse_text: Between the porch and the altar, the priests of the altar, ministering to the Lord, will each be weeping and will say, 'O Lord, spare Your people; do not give Your inheritance to reproach, that the Gentiles should rule over them, lest they should say among the Gentiles, 'Where is their God?' '

links.context: A fast by the faithful has tremendous power in helping to discern the right way of God, and in securing His power against the enemy ([[EST.4:16]]; [[JOL.2:12]]-17; [[MAT.17:17]]- 21).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
